penalties.description: Task appears to be a knot tying demonstration rather than complete FLS Task 5. No visible suture placement through marked targets or completion.

reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as an incomplete task - a knot tying demonstration without the required FLS Task 5 components (Penrose drain with marked targets, suture placement through targets). GPT-4o incorrectly scored this as a completed task with 58-second completion time. The video shows only knot tying technique without the official FLS Task 5 setup and requirements.
